mapper.select: SELECT * FROM operating_expenses ORDER BY expense_date DESC, expense_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operating_expenses (expense_type, amount, expense_date) VALUES (#{expenseType}, #{amount}, #{expenseDate})
mapper.select: SELECT MONTH(expense_date) AS month, SUM(amount) AS total_expense FROM operating_expenses WHERE YEAR(expense_date) = #{year} GROUP BY MONTH(expense_date) ORDER BY MONTH(expense_date)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_expense FROM operating_expenses WHERE YEAR(expense_date) = #{year}
SELECT expense_type AS expense_type, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM operating_expenses WHERE YEAR(expense_date) = #{year} GROUP BY expense_type ORDER BY SUM(amount) DESC
